title: Fix light mode text visibility and update dark mode to teal color scheme

requirements.text: Fix light mode text visibility: ensure all text across every page and component (headings, body text, labels, stat values, sidebar links, card text, etc.) uses dark near-black colors (e.g., #111827 or equivalent dark gray) so they are clearly visible on white/light backgrounds. No light-colored or white text should appear on light backgrounds in light mode.

quotes: Light mode — text is invisible (likely white/light text on white background) make font darker

acceptanceCriteria: In light mode, all text on Dashboard, Tasks, Projects, Schedule, Activities, Settings, Team pages is dark and readable
No white or near-white text appears on white or light card/background surfaces in light mode
CSS custom properties for foreground, card text, muted text, and sidebar text in the light theme use dark values in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css

requirements.text: Update the dark mode color scheme to use teal as the primary accent color throughout the entire application. Replace existing purple/violet/orange accent colors in dark mode with teal shades (e.g., teal-400 #2dd4bf, teal-500 #14b8a6, teal-600 #0d9488). This includes: active sidebar item highlight, buttons (New Task, primary actions), badges, progress bars, icons, chart accent colors, active nav indicators, and any other accent-colored elements. The dark background (near-black) should remain, only the accent/highlight colors change to teal.

quotes: Dark mode make it teal color shade

acceptanceCriteria: In dark mode, the active sidebar navigation item is highlighted in teal
Primary action buttons (e.g., '+ New Task') use teal background in dark mode
Progress bars, badges, and accent icons use teal shades in dark mode
No purple or orange accent colors remain in dark mode
Dark background color (near-black) is preserved — only accent colors change
Teal accent CSS variables are defined and applied for dark theme in frontend/src/index.css

constraints: Do not change the dark mode background color (keep near-black/dark gray backgrounds)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not alter any backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Adding new color picker or theme selector UI
